title: Network Flow, Cuts, and Bipartite Matching · Scale Transfer
summary: Assign workers to constrained jobs and identify capacity bottlenecks. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a flow-based assignment model and cut explanation with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate capacities, conservation, source, sink, and residual choices from a stakeholder problem.
Trace forward and reverse residual capacity after augmentation.
Find augmenting paths and update flow without violating capacity or conservation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
